name: house-ledger
description: Electron + React personal money management app
author: Frost

scripts.move:exe: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const release=path.join(root,'release');if(!fs.existsSync(release)) process.exit(0);for(const name of ['AMM-Setup-x64.exe','AMM-Setup-ia32.exe']){const target=path.join(root,name);if(fs.existsSync(target)) fs.rmSync(target,{force:true});}const files=fs.readdirSync(release);for(const f of files){const m=f.match(/^AMM-Setup-.*-(x64|ia32)\.exe$/i);if(m){const dest=path.join(root,'AMM-Setup-'+m[1]+'.exe');fs.copyFileSync(path.join(release,f),dest);console.log('Copied release/'+f+' -> '+path.basename(dest));}}console.log('Portable app folders are available in release/win-unpacked and release/win-ia32-unpacked');"
scripts.predist:win: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.dist:win: npm run react:build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis --x64 && npm run move:exe
scripts.predist:win32: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.dist:win32: npm run react:build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis --ia32 && npm run move:exe
scripts.predist:win:all: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run react:build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis --x64 --ia32 && npm run move:exe
scripts.predist:mac: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.predist:mac:arm64: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.predist:mac:all: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.predist:dir: npm run test && npm run generate:icons && npm run kill-running
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:win:all && echo macOS release files are built in GitHub Actions or on a macOS machine with npm run dist:mac:all
scripts.android:build: npm run react:build && npx cap copy android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:sync: npm run react:build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:studio: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:apk:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
